hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates screening, KYB, and transaction signals into a single operational workflow to create consistent, auditable counterparty risk profiles for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Risk profiles remain fragmented across providers
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble complete counterparty risk views when screening, KYB and transaction data live in separate systems. This fragmentation slows reviews, weakens audit readiness and creates gaps in operational risk visibility for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates screening results, KYB checks and transaction signals into one compliance operating layer that structures case workflows and preserves audit evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to risk profile
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates screening, KYB and transaction signals into structured risk profiles that support review, decision logging and compliance evidence for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. Structured risk profiles
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider data into unified workflows, decisions, cases and evidence supporting clearer counterparty risk profiles and audit-ready compliance control for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs consolidating provider outputs into structured risk profiles with audit-ready evidence and deployment controls for bank due diligence and operational governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY consolidate fragmented counterparty risk profiles
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY structures data from multiple compliance providers
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports counterparty risk review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect into one compliance workflow
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY help VASPs manage risk profiles?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs build connected counterparty risk profiles by consolidating KYB, screening, and transaction signals into structured workflows and comprehensive compliance views.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented compliance data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from multiple providers into one operational layer, structuring alerts, decisions, cases and evidence to reduce manual handoffs and improve risk visibility.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in an audit-ready format to support compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, layering their outputs without disrupting current workflows or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing compliance providers and does not replace them, instead it orchestrates and structures their outputs into connected operational workflows.
final_title: Connect fragmented risk signals into connected profiles
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates screening, KYB and transaction data into audit-ready counterparty risk workflows for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
